accessibility.text: Just in time, the woman sitting next to the man pouring the beer realizes the impending spill. In a swift, playful motion, she pulls her hair back and leans in to sip the foam, saving the beer from overflowing.

The entire family is around the table (may be not sitting), immersed in a lively and warm atmosphere. People are everywhere – some laughing sharing stories and jokes, others just arriving, welcomed into the fold. Laughter and conversation fill the air. From the background, we hear an inviting shout:
Timing : 10 sec. (Including beauty shots and packshot)
